title: Scuba Cat Totem
description: SCUBAAA CATTT. Yes, this resource pack adds, a scuba cat totem.
body:
A lot of people. and I mean, A lot of people, asked me to release the scuba totem files.

So its finally here!

All the pack introduces is a scuba cat totem. thats all. an animated scuba cat meme totem texture. its edited perfectly to be dancing the viral scuba dance near your hotbar.

Have fun using it!

![Scuba cat meme](https://media.tenor.com/Rd0jrWH5JjgAAAAe/cat-scuba.png)
